name: RETROPERITONEAL LYMPHOMA
dominant_finding: mass enveloping normal constituents of renal sinus
discriminating_features: well-defined homogeneous hypoattenuating mass spreading between normal structures
mass enveloping normal constituents of renal sinus
often contiguous spread into perinephric space
± anterior displacement of IVC and aorta ("floating aorta")
rarely calcified + necrotic prior to therapy

US: heterogeneous predominantly hypoechoic mass ← varying degrees of hemorrhage and
CT: well-defined homogeneous hypoattenuating mass spreading between normal structures
mass enveloping normal constituents of renal sinus
often contiguous spread into perinephric space
± anterior displacement of IVC and aorta ("floating aorta")
rarely calcified + necrotic prior to therapy
CECT: mild to moderate homogeneous contrast enhancement
MR: low signal intensity on T2WI + minimal enhancement
